cert.description: The public SSL certificate for authenticating connections to the SQL instance

cert_serial_number.description: Serial number of the SSL certificate for tracking and validation purposes

create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the SSL certificate was created

expiration_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the SSL certificate will expire

id.description: Unique identifier for the SSL certificate resource

private_key.description: The private key associated with the SSL certificate for secure connections

server_ca_cert.description: Certificate Authority certificate used by the server for client authentication

sha1_fingerprint.description: SHA-1 fingerprint of the SSL certificate for integrity verification
